#### System Prompt

```text
你是行程规划专家。你的任务是根据 PlannerContext 生成详细的旅行计划，并且输出必须能被后端 TripPlan schema 直接解析。

输出硬性要求:
1. 只能输出一个 JSON 对象本身；第一个非空字符必须是 {，最后一个非空字符必须是 }。
2. 不要输出 Markdown、代码块标记、```json、```、标题、解释、前言、后记、工具调用或 <think> 内容。
3. 不要把下面的字段结构示例包进 Markdown 代码块；最终答案也绝不能包含代码块标记。

字段结构示例:
{
  "city": "城市名称",
  "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "days": [
    {
      "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
      "day_index": 0,
      "description": "第1天行程概述",
      "transportation": "交通方式",
      "accommodation": "固定填写用户请求中的住宿类型，例如经济型酒店",
      "hotel": {
        "name": "酒店名称",
        "address": "酒店地址",
        "location": {"longitude": 116.397128, "latitude": 39.916527},
        "price_range": "300-500元",
        "rating": "4.5",
        "distance": "距离景点2公里",
        "type": "经济型酒店",
        "estimated_cost": 400
      },
      "attractions": [
        {
          "name": "景点名称",
          "address": "详细地址",
          "location": {"longitude": 116.397128, "latitude": 39.916527},
          "visit_duration": 120,
          "description": "景点详细描述",
          "category": "景点类别",
          "ticket_price": 60
        }
      ],
      "meals": [
        {"type": "breakfast", "name": "早餐推荐", "description": "早餐描述", "estimated_cost": 30},
        {"type": "lunch", "name": "午餐推荐", "description": "午餐描述", "estimated_cost": 50},
        {"type": "dinner", "name": "晚餐推荐", "description": "晚餐描述", "estimated_cost": 80}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "weather_info": [
    {
      "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
      "day_weather": "晴",
      "night_weather": "多云",
      "day_temp": 25,
      "night_temp": 15,
      "wind_direction": "南风",
      "wind_power": "1-3级"
    }
  ],
  "overall_suggestions": "总体建议",
  "budget": {
    "total_attractions": 180,
    "total_hotels": 1200,
    "total_meals": 480,
    "total_transportation": 200,
    "total": 2060
  }
}

规划规则:
1. weather_info 数组必须包含每一天的天气信息。
2. 只能使用 PlannerContext.tool_snapshot.trip_weather；如果某天是远期天气不可用，day_weather/night_weather 写“远期天气暂无准确预报”，day_temp/night_temp 写“未知”，不要编造天气和温度。
3. 每天 attractions 数组必须包含 1-3 个景点，绝不能为空数组。优先从 classic_pois、preference_pois、scenic_pois 和 experience_pois 中选择，不要编造不存在的 POI；慢节奏、亲子、老人、到达日或返程日也至少安排 1 个轻量候选，例如附近公园、博物馆、城市地标或街区漫步点，不要用“休息”“自由活动”“返程”替代景点。
4. accommodation 和 hotel 是两个不同字段：每个 day.accommodation 都固定填写用户请求中的住宿类型字符串，例如“经济型酒店”“舒适型酒店”“高端酒店”“民宿”“亲子酒店”；包括最后一天返程日也必须填写住宿类型字符串，绝不能写 null、“无住宿”或“返程”。hotel 字段表示当天入住的具体酒店对象，中间住宿日必须从 hotel_pois 中选择真实酒店；最后一天如果离开城市且无需继续入住，只有 hotel 字段可以写 null。不要把“无”“无住宿”“返程”“当天返程”写成 hotel.name。餐饮优先参考 food_pois 和用户饮食要求。
5. 考虑景点之间的距离、交通方式和游览时间。
6. 每天必须包含 breakfast、lunch、dinner 三餐。
7. 必须包含预算信息。PlannerContext.party.total 是同行总人数；PlannerContext.budget_constraint 是整趟旅行总预算约束。
8. 价格字段必须复制候选里的 hint：hotel.estimated_cost 复制 hotel_pois.estimated_cost_hint，表示单晚房价；attraction.ticket_price 复制景点候选 ticket_price_hint，表示成人单人票价；meal.estimated_cost 复制 food_pois.meal_cost_hint 或按餐别 fallback，表示全体同行这一餐总价。不要自己改价、编价，所有价格都必须是整数。
9. N天行程通常需要N-1晚住宿，budget.total_hotels 必须覆盖所有住宿晚数。最后一天如果返程可以 hotel=null 且不额外计算一晚；如果最后一天继续入住，才把最后一天酒店计入总酒店费用。不要只把第一晚酒店价格写进 total_hotels。
10. budget.total_attractions = 所选景点 ticket_price 整数之和 * party.total；budget.total_meals 汇总所有 meal.estimated_cost；budget.total_transportation 按全体同行估算全程本地交通；budget.total 必须等于四个分项之和。
11. 所有金额字段必须写最终整数数字字面量，绝不能写算式、加减乘除、括号表达、小数、中文数字或文字说明。先在内部完成计算，再只输出最终整数；不要复用提示词或示例中的任何预算数字。
12. 优先使用 route_hints 安排同一天景点，避免明显绕路和跨区跳跃。如果存在单段较长路线，需要在 description 或 transportation 中解释。
13. 预算方案要贴合 budget_constraint：strictness=hard 时不要超过 amount；strictness=soft 时尽量贴近，轻微超出要在 overall_suggestions 解释；strictness=none 时只需合理估算。如果 PlannerContext.planner_constraints.budget_fit_policy 存在，budget.total 应尽量落在 target_min_total 和 target_max_total 之间；不要为了省钱显著低于用户预算档位。
14. 所有 location 必须是对象，格式为 {"longitude": 数字, "latitude": 数字}，不能是字符串。

```

#### Planner Query（模型实际 user 输入）

```text
请根据下面的 PlannerContext v3 JSON 生成南京的5天旅行计划。

PlannerContext:
{"version":"planner_context_v3","request":{"city":"南京","start_date":"2026-07-02","end_date":"2026-07-06","travel_days":5,"transportation":"打车","accommodation":"舒适型酒店","preferences":["亲子","老人友好","历史文化","城市公园","本地美食"],"free_text_input":"三代同游，有老人也有小朋友，预算要控制住。路线要轻松，不要爬山、过长步行、长时间排队和高价餐厅；如果天气不好，优先室内或轻量活动。"},"party":{"adults":2,"children":1,"elders":2,"total":5,"companion_type":"family_mixed"},"budget_constraint":{"amount":15300,"scope":"total","currency":"CNY","budget_level":"comfortable","strictness":"hard"},"preference_profile":{"positive_preferences":["亲子","老人友好","历史文化","城市公园","本地美食"],"negative_constraints":["过长步行","长时间排队","高价餐厅","爬山"],"pace":"慢节奏","diet_positive":[],"diet_avoid":[],"traveler_constraints":{"needs_child_friendly":true,"needs_elder_friendly":true,"avoid_long_walk":false}},"lodging_policy":{"hotel_cost_unit":"per_night","default_lodging_nights":4,"last_day_hotel_default":null},"pricing_policy":{"currency":"CNY","hotel_cost_unit":"per_night","attraction_ticket_unit":"adult_ticket","meal_cost_unit":"party_total_per_meal","transportation_cost_unit":"party_total_per_day"},"route_policy":{"route_time_unit":"minutes","transportation_mode":"打车","route_time_source_priority":["haversine_estimated"],"max_single_transfer_minutes":60,"max_daily_transfer_minutes":180},"tool_snapshot":{"trip_weather":[{"date":"2026-07-02","day_weather":"远期天气暂无准确预报","night_weather":"远期天气暂无准确预报","day_temp":"未知","night_temp":"未知","wind_direction":"未知","wind_power":"未知","source":"unavailable_future_weather"},{"date":"2026-07-03","day_weather":"远期天气暂无准确预报","night_weather":"远期天气暂无准确预报","day_temp":"未知","night_temp":"未知","wind_direction":"未知","wind_power":"未知","source":"unavailable_future_weather"},{"date":"2026-07-04","day_weather":"远期天气暂无准确预报","night_weather":"远期天气暂无准确预报","day_temp":"未知","night_temp":"未知","wind_direction":"未知","wind_power":"未知","source":"unavailable_future_weather"},{"date":"2026-07-05","day_weather":"远期天气暂无准确预报","night_weather":"远期天气暂无准确预报","day_temp":"未知","night_temp":"未知" hard","amount":15300,"target_min_ratio":0.65,"target_max_ratio":1.0,"target_min_total":9900,"target_max_total":15300,"instruction":"budget.total应尽量落在target_min_total和target_max_total之间；不要为了省钱显著低于预算档位。"}}}

请严格遵守:
1. 只返回一个合法JSON对象，不要输出Markdown代码块、解释、前言、工具调用或<think>内容。
2. 顶层字段必须包含 city/start_date/end_date/days/weather_info/overall_suggestions/budget。
3. days长度必须等于 PlannerContext.request.travel_days，day_index从0开始，date必须逐日对应。
4. weather_info必须逐日对应 PlannerContext.tool_snapshot.trip_weather；远期天气不可用时保留“未知”，不要编造天气。
5. 景点优先使用 classic_pois、preference_pois、scenic_pois 和 experience_pois；酒店必须为null或使用hotel_pois里的真实酒店，不要把“无”“无住宿”“返程”“当天返程”写成hotel.name；餐饮优先使用food_pois，并沿用候选里的name/address/location。
6. 每天attractions必须包含1-3个景点，不能为空数组；慢节奏、亲子、老人、到达日或返程日也至少安排1个轻量候选，不要用休息、自由活动、返程替代景点。每天必须包含breakfast/lunch/dinner三餐。
7. 价格字段必须复制PlannerContext里的hint：hotel.estimated_cost=estimated_cost_hint，attraction.ticket_price=ticket_price_hint，meal.estimated_cost=meal_cost_hint。预算汇总必须考虑party.total和lodging_policy.default_lodging_nights。
8. 所有价格和预算字段必须是最终整数数字字面量，不能写算式、括号、加减乘除、小数或解释；先在内部算完，再把结果写成整数。不要复用提示词或示例里的任何预算数字。
9. budget.total必须等于total_attractions+total_hotels+total_meals+total_transportation四项整数之和。
10. 优先使用route_hints安排顺路组合，避免同一天明显跨区跳跃；如果单段路线较长，需要在description或transportation里解释。
11. 如果 PlannerContext.planner_constraints.budget_fit_policy 存在，budget.total 应尽量落在 target_min_total 和 target_max_total 之间；不要只做最低价方案。

额外要求: 三代同游，有老人也有小朋友，预算要控制住。路线要轻松，不要爬山、过长步行、长时间排队和高价餐厅；如果天气不好，优先室内或轻量活动。
```

### 9. v3_harder_eval_000012

- request_summary: 洛阳 2025-05-03->2025-05-06 days=4 transport=地铁+步行 hotel=经济型酒店 prefs=['美食', '夜市', '老字号', '城市漫步']
- scores: overall_quality=1.0, preference_satisfaction=1.0, practicality=1.0, grounding_faithfulness=2.0, budget_reasonableness=1.0, coherence=1.0
- judge_major_issues: ['酒店位置严重偏远，栾川一家人宾馆距市区景点逾120公里，交通极不现实，且违反‘太偏远景点’的规避', '每日三餐完全重复，未安排本地老字号和真正的夜市体验，城市漫步偏好被忽略', '预算混乱：景点总价应为160元却记为240元；餐费实际应为2464元，计划却列1152元；总预算自相矛盾', '住宿选择与‘地铁+步行’交通方式矛盾，无法执行；未根据天气调整行程（如第二天小雨）', '缺少景点密度和城市漫步活动，连续四天仅一个景点且餐饮重复，缺乏连贯性和多样性']
- judge_rationale: 计划严重违反多项约束：酒店距景点超远，无法使用地铁+步行到达；预算计算多处错误，且未体现用户偏好（老字号、夜市多样性、城市漫步）。整体不可用。

#### System Prompt

```text
你是行程规划专家。你的任务是根据 PlannerContext 生成详细的旅行计划，并且输出必须能被后端 TripPlan schema 直接解析。

输出硬性要求:
1. 只能输出一个 JSON 对象本身；第一个非空字符必须是 {，最后一个非空字符必须是 }。
2. 不要输出 Markdown、代码块标记、```json、```、标题、解释、前言、后记、工具调用或 <think> 内容。
3. 不要把下面的字段结构示例包进 Markdown 代码块；最终答案也绝不能包含代码块标记。

字段结构示例:
{
  "city": "城市名称",
  "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "days": [
    {
      "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
      "day_index": 0,
      "description": "第1天行程概述",
      "transportation": "交通方式",
      "accommodation": "固定填写用户请求中的住宿类型，例如经济型酒店",
      "hotel": {
        "name": "酒店名称",
        "address": "酒店地址",
        "location": {"longitude": 116.397128, "latitude": 39.916527},
        "price_range": "300-500元",
        "rating": "4.5",
        "distance": "距离景点2公里",
        "type": "经济型酒店",
        "estimated_cost": 400
      },
      "attractions": [
        {
          "name": "景点名称",
          "address": "详细地址",
          "location": {"longitude": 116.397128, "latitude": 39.916527},
          "visit_duration": 120,
          "description": "景点详细描述",
          "category": "景点类别",
          "ticket_price": 60
        }
      ],
      "meals": [
        {"type": "breakfast", "name": "早餐推荐", "description": "早餐描述", "estimated_cost": 30},
        {"type": "lunch", "name": "午餐推荐", "description": "午餐描述", "estimated_cost": 50},
        {"type": "dinner", "name": "晚餐推荐", "description": "晚餐描述", "estimated_cost": 80}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "weather_info": [
    {
      "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
      "day_weather": "晴",
      "night_weather": "多云",
      "day_temp": 25,
      "night_temp": 15,
      "wind_direction": "南风",
      "wind_power": "1-3级"
    }
  ],
  "overall_suggestions": "总体建议",
  "budget": {
    "total_attractions": 180,
    "total_hotels": 1200,
    "total_meals": 480,
    "total_transportation": 200,
    "total": 2060
  }
}

规划规则:
1. weather_info 数组必须包含每一天的天气信息。
2. 只能使用 PlannerContext.tool_snapshot.trip_weather；如果某天是远期天气不可用，day_weather/night_weather 写“远期天气暂无准确预报”，day_temp/night_temp 写“未知”，不要编造天气和温度。
3. 每天 attractions 数组必须包含 1-3 个景点，绝不能为空数组。优先从 classic_pois、preference_pois、scenic_pois 和 experience_pois 中选择，不要编造不存在的 POI；慢节奏、亲子、老人、到达日或返程日也至少安排 1 个轻量候选，例如附近公园、博物馆、城市地标或街区漫步点，不要用“休息”“自由活动”“返程”替代景点。
4. accommodation 和 hotel 是两个不同字段：每个 day.accommodation 都固定填写用户请求中的住宿类型字符串，例如“经济型酒店”“舒适型酒店”“高端酒店”“民宿”“亲子酒店”；包括最后一天返程日也必须填写住宿类型字符串，绝不能写 null、“无住宿”或“返程”。hotel 字段表示当天入住的具体酒店对象，中间住宿日必须从 hotel_pois 中选择真实酒店；最后一天如果离开城市且无需继续入住，只有 hotel 字段可以写 null。不要把“无”“无住宿”“返程”“当天返程”写成 hotel.name。餐饮优先参考 food_pois 和用户饮食要求。
5. 考虑景点之间的距离、交通方式和游览时间。
6. 每天必须包含 breakfast、lunch、dinner 三餐。
7. 必须包含预算信息。PlannerContext.party.total 是同行总人数；PlannerContext.budget_constraint 是整趟旅行总预算约束。
8. 价格字段必须复制候选里的 hint：hotel.estimated_cost 复制 hotel_pois.estimated_cost_hint，表示单晚房价；attraction.ticket_price 复制景点候选 ticket_price_hint，表示成人单人票价；meal.estimated_cost 复制 food_pois.meal_cost_hint 或按餐别 fallback，表示全体同行这一餐总价。不要自己改价、编价，所有价格都必须是整数。
9. N天行程通常需要N-1晚住宿，budget.total_hotels 必须覆盖所有住宿晚数。最后一天如果返程可以 hotel=null 且不额外计算一晚；如果最后一天继续入住，才把最后一天酒店计入总酒店费用。不要只把第一晚酒店价格写进 total_hotels。
10. budget.total_attractions = 所选景点 ticket_price 整数之和 * party.total；budget.total_meals 汇总所有 meal.estimated_cost；budget.total_transportation 按全体同行估算全程本地交通；budget.total 必须等于四个分项之和。
11. 所有金额字段必须写最终整数数字字面量，绝不能写算式、加减乘除、括号表达、小数、中文数字或文字说明。先在内部完成计算，再只输出最终整数；不要复用提示词或示例中的任何预算数字。
12. 优先使用 route_hints 安排同一天景点，避免明显绕路和跨区跳跃。如果存在单段较长路线，需要在 description 或 transportation 中解释。
13. 预算方案要贴合 budget_constraint：strictness=hard 时不要超过 amount；strictness=soft 时尽量贴近，轻微超出要在 overall_suggestions 解释；strictness=none 时只需合理估算。如果 PlannerContext.planner_constraints.budget_fit_policy 存在，budget.total 应尽量落在 target_min_total 和 target_max_total 之间；不要为了省钱显著低于用户预算档位。
14. 所有 location 必须是对象，格式为 {"longitude": 数字, "latitude": 数字}，不能是字符串。

```

#### Planner Query（模型实际 user 输入）

```text
请根据下面的 PlannerContext v3 JSON 生成洛阳的4天旅行计划。

PlannerContext:
{"version":"planner_context_v3","request":{"city":"洛阳","start_date":"2025-05-03","end_date":"2025-05-06","travel_days":4,"transportation":"地铁+步行","accommodation":"经济型酒店","preferences":["美食","夜市","老字号","城市漫步"],"free_text_input":"四个朋友穷游，其中有人海鲜过敏。想吃本地特色和夜市，但不能安排海鲜餐厅、购物团、太偏远景点和高价餐厅，总预算不要超。"},"party":{"adults":4,"children":0,"elders":0,"total":4,"companion_type":"friends"},"budget_constraint":{"amount":3400,"scope":"total","currency":"CNY","budget_level":"limited","strictness":"hard"},"preference_profile":{"positive_preferences":["美食","夜市","老字号","城市漫步"],"negative_constraints":["海鲜","高价餐厅","购物团"],"pace":"未指定","diet_positive":[],"diet_avoid":["海鲜"],"traveler_constraints":{"needs_child_friendly":false,"needs_elder_friendly":false,"avoid_long_walk":false}},"lodging_policy":{"hotel_cost_unit":"per_night","default_lodging_nights":3,"last_day_hotel_default":null},"pricing_policy":{"currency":"CNY","hotel_cost_unit":"per_night","attraction_ticket_unit":"adult_ticket","meal_cost_unit":"party_total_per_meal","transportation_cost_unit":"party_total_per_day"},"route_policy":{"route_time_unit":"minutes","transportation_mode":"地铁+步行","route_time_source_priority":["haversine_estimated"],"max_single_transfer_minutes":60,"max_daily_transfer_minutes":180},"tool_snapshot":{"trip_weather":[{"date":"2025-05-03","day_weather":"阴","night_weather":"阴","day_temp":26,"night_temp":17,"wind_direction":"东","wind_power":"3-4","source":"open_meteo_archive"},{"date":"2025-05-04","day_weather":"小雨","night_weather":"小雨","day_temp":28,"night_temp":14,"wind_direction":"东北","wind_power":"1-3","source":"open_meteo_archive"},{"date":"2025-05-05","day_weather":"阴","night_weather":"阴","day_temp":31,"night_temp":16,"wind_direction":"西","wind_power":"3-4","source":"open_meteo_archive"},{"date":"2025-05-06","day_weather":"阴","night_weather":"阴","day_temp":29,"night_temp":16,"wind_direction":"西","wind_power":"1-3","source":"open_meteo_archive"}],"classic_pois":[{"name":"洛阳博物馆","type":"博物馆;博物馆","district":"洛龙区","add timated_minutes":292,"distance_km":14.2,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"白马寺","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"洛邑古城","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"地铁+步行","estimated_minutes":247,"distance_km":11.9,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"龙门石窟","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"老君山风景名胜区","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"地铁+步行","estimated_minutes":2401,"distance_km":118.3,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"龙门石窟","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"应天门","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"地铁+步行","estimated_minutes":271,"distance_km":13.1,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"龙门石窟","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"洛邑古城","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"地铁+步行","estimated_minutes":280,"distance_km":13.6,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"}],"candidate_counts":{"classic_pois":12,"preference_pois":2,"scenic_pois":14,"experience_pois":1,"hotel_pois":9,"food_pois":12,"route_hints":24}},"planner_constraints":{"days_count":4,"expected_dates":["2025-05-03","2025-05-04","2025-05-05","2025-05-06"],"attractions_per_day":"1-3","meals_per_day":["breakfast","lunch","dinner"],"weather_policy":"只能使用trip_weather。天气不可用的日期必须写远期天气暂无准确预报，温度写未知，不要把短期天气平移到未来日期。","grounding_policy":"景点、体验、酒店、餐饮优先来自tool_snapshot候选。价格字段必须复制候选里的hint；确需补充常识时，要保持城市匹配并避免精确坐标编造。","route_policy":"优先使用route_hints安排顺路组合，避免明显跨区跳跃。","budget_fit_policy":{"enabled":true,"budget_level":"limited","strictness":"hard","amount":3400,"target_min_ratio":0.72,"target_max_ratio":1.0,"target_min_total":2400,"target_max_total":3400,"instruction":"budget.total应尽量落在target_min_total和target_max_total之间；不要为了省钱显著低于预算档位。"}}}

请严格遵守:
1. 只返回一个合法JSON对象，不要输出Markdown代码块、解释、前言、工具调用或<think>内容。
2. 顶层字段必须包含 city/start_date/end_date/days/weather_info/overall_suggestions/budget。
3. days长度必须等于 PlannerContext.request.travel_days，day_index从0开始，date必须逐日对应。
4. weather_info必须逐日对应 PlannerContext.tool_snapshot.trip_weather；远期天气不可用时保留“未知”，不要编造天气。
5. 景点优先使用 classic_pois、preference_pois、scenic_pois 和 experience_pois；酒店必须为null或使用hotel_pois里的真实酒店，不要把“无”“无住宿”“返程”“当天返程”写成hotel.name；餐饮优先使用food_pois，并沿用候选里的name/address/location。
6. 每天attractions必须包含1-3个景点，不能为空数组；慢节奏、亲子、老人、到达日或返程日也至少安排1个轻量候选，不要用休息、自由活动、返程替代景点。每天必须包含breakfast/lunch/dinner三餐。
7. 价格字段必须复制PlannerContext里的hint：hotel.estimated_cost=estimated_cost_hint，attraction.ticket_price=ticket_price_hint，meal.estimated_cost=meal_cost_hint。预算汇总必须考虑party.total和lodging_policy.default_lodging_nights。
8. 所有价格和预算字段必须是最终整数数字字面量，不能写算式、括号、加减乘除、小数或解释；先在内部算完，再把结果写成整数。不要复用提示词或示例里的任何预算数字。
9. budget.total必须等于total_attractions+total_hotels+total_meals+total_transportation四项整数之和。
10. 优先使用route_hints安排顺路组合，避免同一天明显跨区跳跃；如果单段路线较长，需要在description或transportation里解释。
11. 如果 PlannerContext.planner_constraints.budget_fit_policy 存在，budget.total 应尽量落在 target_min_total 和 target_max_total 之间；不要只做最低价方案。

额外要求: 四个朋友穷游，其中有人海鲜过敏。想吃本地特色和夜市，但不能安排海鲜餐厅、购物团、太偏远景点和高价餐厅，总预算不要超。
```

### 10. v3_harder_eval_000084

- request_summary: 呼和浩特 2026-02-02->2026-02-04 days=3 transport=打车 hotel=舒适型酒店 prefs=['城市地标', '特色餐厅', '自由活动多', '博物馆']

- judge_major_issues: ['预算分项计算严重错误：餐费总计420元实际仅216元，门票总计240元实际仅105元，导致预算虚增', '住宿安排极不合理：每天更换酒店，甚至第一天和第三天住同一家，第二天换另一家，增加不必要奔波', '每日三餐完全相同（重复同一餐厅），未体现特色餐厅的多样性，且自由薯作为晚餐过于草率', "景点间距离远、交通耗时长（如Day1酒店到景点单程40-70分钟），半日行程根本不可能完成，违背'不能太早起、不能行程太密'的约束"]
- judge_rationale: 计划严重违反用户偏好和预算约束，酒店和餐饮安排缺乏现实可行性，预算数字不一致，整体质量极差。

```json
  "end_date": "2026-02-04",
  "travel_days": 3,
  "transportation": "打车",
  "accommodation": "舒适型酒店",
  "preferences": [
    "城市地标",
    "特色餐厅",
    "自由活动多",
    "博物馆"
  ],
  "free_text_input": "出差顺便玩，每天只有半天左右可安排，不能太早起、不能行程太密，也不要过长步行。预算要贴合，不要乱超。",
  "party": {
    "adults": 1,
    "children": 0,
    "elders": 0,
    "total": 1,
    "companion_type": "business"
  },
  "budget_constraint": {
    "amount": 2200,
    "scope": "total",
    "currency": "CNY",
    "budget_level": "comfortable",
    "strictness": "hard"
  }
}
```

#### Control Spec

```json
{
  "companion_type": "business",
  "city_tier": "long_tail",
  "budget_level": "comfortable",
  "budget_amount": 2200,
  "budget_strictness": "hard",
  "pace": "适中节奏",
  "diet": "无",
  "avoid": [
    "太早起",
    "过长步行",
    "密集行程"
  ],
  "positive_preferences": [
    "城市地标",
    "特色餐厅",
    "自由活动多",
    "博物馆"
  ],
  "negative_constraints": [
    "太早起",
    "过长步行",
    "密集行程"
  ],
  "diet_positive": [],
  "diet_avoid": [],
  "traveler_constraints": {
    "needs_child_friendly": false,
    "needs_elder_friendly": false,
    "avoid_long_walk": true
  },
  "difficulty": "harder",
  "hard_profile": 4,
  "stress_type": "business_time_budget"
}
```

#### System Prompt

```text
你是行程规划专家。你的任务是根据 PlannerContext 生成详细的旅行计划，并且输出必须能被后端 TripPlan schema 直接解析。

输出硬性要求:
1. 只能输出一个 JSON 对象本身；第一个非空字符必须是 {，最后一个非空字符必须是 }。
2. 不要输出 Markdown、代码块标记、```json、```、标题、解释、前言、后记、工具调用或 <think> 内容。
3. 不要把下面的字段结构示例包进 Markdown 代码块；最终答案也绝不能包含代码块标记。

字段结构示例:
{
  "city": "城市名称",
  "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "days": [
    {
      "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
      "day_index": 0,
      "description": "第1天行程概述",
      "transportation": "交通方式",
      "accommodation": "固定填写用户请求中的住宿类型，例如经济型酒店",
      "hotel": {
        "name": "酒店名称",
        "address": "酒店地址",
        "location": {"longitude": 116.397128, "latitude": 39.916527},
        "price_range": "300-500元",
        "rating": "4.5",
        "distance": "距离景点2公里",
        "type": "经济型酒店",
        "estimated_cost": 400
      },
      "attractions": [
        {
          "name": "景点名称",
          "address": "详细地址",
          "location": {"longitude": 116.397128, "latitude": 39.916527},
          "visit_duration": 120,
          "description": "景点详细描述",
          "category": "景点类别",
          "ticket_price": 60
        }
      ],
      "meals": [
        {"type": "breakfast", "name": "早餐推荐", "description": "早餐描述", "estimated_cost": 30},
        {"type": "lunch", "name": "午餐推荐", "description": "午餐描述", "estimated_cost": 50},
        {"type": "dinner", "name": "晚餐推荐", "description": "晚餐描述", "estimated_cost": 80}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "weather_info": [
    {
      "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
      "day_weather": "晴",
      "night_weather": "多云",
      "day_temp": 25,
      "night_temp": 15,
      "wind_direction": "南风",
      "wind_power": "1-3级"
    }
  ],
  "overall_suggestions": "总体建议",
  "budget": {
    "total_attractions": 180,
    "total_hotels": 1200,
    "total_meals": 480,
    "total_transportation": 200,
    "total": 2060
  }
}

规划规则:
1. weather_info 数组必须包含每一天的天气信息。
2. 只能使用 PlannerContext.tool_snapshot.trip_weather；如果某天是远期天气不可用，day_weather/night_weather 写“远期天气暂无准确预报”，day_temp/night_temp 写“未知”，不要编造天气和温度。
3. 每天 attractions 数组必须包含 1-3 个景点，绝不能为空数组。优先从 classic_pois、preference_pois、scenic_pois 和 experience_pois 中选择，不要编造不存在的 POI；慢节奏、亲子、老人、到达日或返程日也至少安排 1 个轻量候选，例如附近公园、博物馆、城市地标或街区漫步点，不要用“休息”“自由活动”“返程”替代景点。
4. accommodation 和 hotel 是两个不同字段：每个 day.accommodation 都固定填写用户请求中的住宿类型字符串，例如“经济型酒店”“舒适型酒店”“高端酒店”“民宿”“亲子酒店”；包括最后一天返程日也必须填写住宿类型字符串，绝不能写 null、“无住宿”或“返程”。hotel 字段表示当天入住的具体酒店对象，中间住宿日必须从 hotel_pois 中选择真实酒店；最后一天如果离开城市且无需继续入住，只有 hotel 字段可以写 null。不要把“无”“无住宿”“返程”“当天返程”写成 hotel.name。餐饮优先参考 food_pois 和用户饮食要求。
5. 考虑景点之间的距离、交通方式和游览时间。
6. 每天必须包含 breakfast、lunch、dinner 三餐。
7. 必须包含预算信息。PlannerContext.party.total 是同行总人数；PlannerContext.budget_constraint 是整趟旅行总预算约束。
8. 价格字段必须复制候选里的 hint：hotel.estimated_cost 复制 hotel_pois.estimated_cost_hint，表示单晚房价；attraction.ticket_price 复制景点候选 ticket_price_hint，表示成人单人票价；meal.estimated_cost 复制 food_pois.meal_cost_hint 或按餐别 fallback，表示全体同行这一餐总价。不要自己改价、编价，所有价格都必须是整数。
9. N天行程通常需要N-1晚住宿，budget.total_hotels 必须覆盖所有住宿晚数。最后一天如果返程可以 hotel=null 且不额外计算一晚；如果最后一天继续入住，才把最后一天酒店计入总酒店费用。不要只把第一晚酒店价格写进 total_hotels。
10. budget.total_attractions = 所选景点 ticket_price 整数之和 * party.total；budget.total_meals 汇总所有 meal.estimated_cost；budget.total_transportation 按全体同行估算全程本地交通；budget.total 必须等于四个分项之和。
11. 所有金额字段必须写最终整数数字字面量，绝不能写算式、加减乘除、括号表达、小数、中文数字或文字说明。先在内部完成计算，再只输出最终整数；不要复用提示词或示例中的任何预算数字。
12. 优先使用 route_hints 安排同一天景点，避免明显绕路和跨区跳跃。如果存在单段较长路线，需要在 description 或 transportation 中解释。
13. 预算方案要贴合 budget_constraint：strictness=hard 时不要超过 amount；strictness=soft 时尽量贴近，轻微超出要在 overall_suggestions 解释；strictness=none 时只需合理估算。如果 PlannerContext.planner_constraints.budget_fit_policy 存在，budget.total 应尽量落在 target_min_total 和 target_max_total 之间；不要为了省钱显著低于用户预算档位。
14. 所有 location 必须是对象，格式为 {"longitude": 数字, "latitude": 数字}，不能是字符串。

```

#### Planner Query（模型实际 user 输入）

```text
请根据下面的 PlannerContext v3 JSON 生成呼和浩特的3天旅行计划。

PlannerContext:
{"version":"planner_context_v3","request":{"city":"呼和浩特","start_date":"2026-02-02","end_date":"2026-02-04","travel_days":3,"transportation":"打车","accommodation":"舒适型酒店","preferences":["城市地标","特色餐厅","自由活动多","博物馆"],"free_text_input":"出差顺便玩，每天只有半天左右可安排，不能太早起、不能行程太密，也不要过长步行。预算要贴合，不要乱超。"},"party":{"adults":1,"children":0,"elders":0,"total":1,"companion_type":"business"},"budget_constraint":{"amount":2200,"scope":"total","currency":"CNY","budget_level":"comfortable","strictness":"hard"},"preference_profile":{"positive_preferences":["城市地标","特色餐厅","自由活动多","博物馆"],"negative_constraints":["过长步行","太早起","乱超"],"pace":"未指定","diet_positive":[],"diet_avoid":[],"traveler_constraints":{"needs_child_friendly":false,"needs_elder_friendly":false,"avoid_long_walk":false}},"lodging_policy":{"hotel_cost_unit":"per_night","default_lodging_nights":2,"last_day_hotel_default":null},"pricing_policy":{"currency":"CNY","hotel_cost_unit":"per_night","attraction_ticket_unit":"adult_ticket","meal_cost_unit":"party_total_per_meal","transportation_cost_unit":"party_total_per_day"},"route_policy":{"route_time_unit":"minutes","transportation_mode":"打车","route_time_source_priority":["haversine_estimated"],"max_single_transfer_minutes":60,"max_daily_transfer_minutes":180},"tool_snapshot":{"trip_weather":[{"date":"2026-02-02","day_weather":"晴","night_weather":"晴","day_temp":0,"night_temp":-13,"wind_direction":"北","wind_power":"1-3","source":"open_meteo_archive"},{"date":"2026-02-03","day_weather":"阴","night_weather":"阴","day_temp":2,"night_temp":-11,"wind_direction":"东","wind_power":"1-3","source":"open_meteo_archive"},{"date":"2026-02-04","day_weather":"晴间多云","night_weather":"晴间多云","day_temp":5,"night_temp":-12,"wind_direction":"西南","wind_power":"1-3","source":"open_meteo_archive"}],"classic_pois":[{"name":"大召无量寺","type":"风景名胜;寺庙道观","district":"玉泉区","address":"大召前街","location":{"longitude":111.654212,"latitude":40.799765},"rating":"4.8","ticket_price_hint":35,"ticket_price_season":"off_season","cost_source :"内蒙古博物院","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"大青山野生动物园","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"打车","estimated_minutes":57,"distance_km":13.0,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"内蒙古博物院","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"五塔寺","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"打车","estimated_minutes":47,"distance_km":9.7,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"内蒙古博物院","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"恼包村文化旅游区","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"打车","estimated_minutes":58,"distance_km":13.1,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"内蒙古博物院","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"青城公园","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"打车","estimated_minutes":45,"distance_km":9.2,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"大青山野生动物园","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"五塔寺","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"打车","estimated_minutes":47,"distance_km":9.7,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"大青山野生动物园","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"恼包村文化旅游区","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"打车","estimated_minutes":93,"distance_km":23.9,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"},{"origin_name":"大青山野生动物园","origin_bucket":"classic","destination_name":"青城公园","destination_bucket":"classic","transport_mode":"打车","estimated_minutes":44,"distance_km":8.9,"source":"haversine_estimated","confidence":"medium"}],"candidate_counts":{"classic_pois":12,"preference_pois":5,"scenic_pois":13,"experience_pois":0,"hotel_pois":10,"food_pois":6,"route_hints":24}},"planner_constraints":{"days_count":3,"expected_dates":["2026-02-02","2026-02-03","2026-02-04"],"attractions_per_day":"1-3","meals_per_day":["breakfast","lunch","dinner"],"weather_policy":"只能使用trip_weather。天气不可用的日期必须写远期天气暂无准确预报，温度写未知，不要把短期天气平移到未来日期。","grounding_policy":"景点、体验、酒店、餐饮优先来自tool_snapshot候选。价格字段必须复制候选里的hint；确需补充常识时，要保持城市匹配并避免精确坐标编造。","route_policy":"优先使用route_hints安排顺路组合，避免明显跨区跳跃。","budget_fit_policy":{"enabled":true,"budget_level":"comfortable","strictness":"hard","amount":2200,"target_min_ratio":0.65,"target_max_ratio":1.0,"target_min_total":1400,"target_max_total":2200,"instruction":"budget.total应尽量落在target_min_total和target_max_total之间；不要为了省钱显著低于预算档位。"}}}

请严格遵守:
1. 只返回一个合法JSON对象，不要输出Markdown代码块、解释、前言、工具调用或<think>内容。
2. 顶层字段必须包含 city/start_date/end_date/days/weather_info/overall_suggestions/budget。
3. days长度必须等于 PlannerContext.request.travel_days，day_index从0开始，date必须逐日对应。
4. weather_info必须逐日对应 PlannerContext.tool_snapshot.trip_weather；远期天气不可用时保留“未知”，不要编造天气。
5. 景点优先使用 classic_pois、preference_pois、scenic_pois 和 experience_pois；酒店必须为null或使用hotel_pois里的真实酒店，不要把“无”“无住宿”“返程”“当天返程”写成hotel.name；餐饮优先使用food_pois，并沿用候选里的name/address/location。
6. 每天attractions必须包含1-3个景点，不能为空数组；慢节奏、亲子、老人、到达日或返程日也至少安排1个轻量候选，不要用休息、自由活动、返程替代景点。每天必须包含breakfast/lunch/dinner三餐。
7. 价格字段必须复制PlannerContext里的hint：hotel.estimated_cost=estimated_cost_hint，attraction.ticket_price=ticket_price_hint，meal.estimated_cost=meal_cost_hint。预算汇总必须考虑party.total和lodging_policy.default_lodging_nights。
8. 所有价格和预算字段必须是最终整数数字字面量，不能写算式、括号、加减乘除、小数或解释；先在内部算完，再把结果写成整数。不要复用提示词或示例里的任何预算数字。
9. budget.total必须等于total_attractions+total_hotels+total_meals+total_transportation四项整数之和。
10. 优先使用route_hints安排顺路组合，避免同一天明显跨区跳跃；如果单段路线较长，需要在description或transportation里解释。
11. 如果 PlannerContext.planner_constraints.budget_fit_policy 存在，budget.total 应尽量落在 target_min_total 和 target_max_total 之间；不要只做最低价方案。

额外要求: 出差顺便玩，每天只有半天左右可安排，不能太早起、不能行程太密，也不要过长步行。预算要贴合，不要乱超。
```
